meaning: vt.释放,解放,[律]使(孩子.妻子)摆脱家长的管教而获得合法权利
examples: This new machine will emancipate us from the hard work.
To emancipate all mankind, we will balk at no sacrifice. even that of our lives.
This new machine will emancipate us from all the hard work.
Our mission and vision is to educate and emancipate these less fortunate people.
One caution before you rush to emancipate your child: Check the definition of "dependent" in your health plan contract.
